home.heroSubtitle: Welcoming people from every nation, tribe, and language to worship together in Phuket, Thailand.
home.newHereText: We know visiting a new church can feel daunting. Let us help make your first visit a great one.
home.alphaCta: Exploring the Christian faith? Alpha Course starts soon.
home.newsletterText: Get weekly updates, sermon notes, and event reminders.
home.missionSubtitle: A community of believers from around the world, growing together in faith, love, and purpose.
home.value1Text: Spirit-filled, contemporary worship that connects hearts to God every week.
home.value2Text: Genuine friendships and belonging for people of every background and nationality.
home.value3Text: Sharing love and hope with Phuket and beyond through acts of service and mission.
home.watchSubtitle: Missed a service? Catch up on our latest messages online, anytime.
home.gallerySubtitle: See what it's like to be part of our community
